column2: only 2 verifiable walkable POIs (fishing port, municipal administration); nearest beaches Baia Azul/Caotinha are 8-10 km away, no market/plaza/church Places listings found
no verifiable shopping-dining POI: Google Places coverage of Baishan (Hunjiang district) is nearly empty, queries matched wrong cities (Jilin City, Hunchun, Linjiang); 3 POIs generated text-only
